title: THE ONE SECOND COLLAB 3
description:
A collaborative effort made by some cool bros over at YCP. Each participant made a one second poop, and then it was compiled into this mess.

Credits to TheChutley for compiling/watermarking this whole thing. Without him, the collab would've probably never happened.
http://youtube.com/TheChutley

For a full list of participants and some other info about the collaboration, check out the thread on YouChew: http://youchewpoop.com/forum/viewtopic.php?f=66&t=74252
